title: Executive Order 9052—Amending Subdivision VIII of Schedule A of the Civil Service Rules

flags.justification: A narrow, single-position exemption under the well-established Schedule A mechanism for policy-advisory positions.
A civil-service classification rule, not a compliance regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
A standing rule for an ongoing position category, evergreen by nature.
Schedule A exemptions are a well-established, congressionally-anticipated category for policy-sensitive positions, not a novel removal of oversight.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
An extremely narrow, single-position rule amendment.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
A single, narrow, well-recognized position-category exemption, applied to one named position, not a broad undermining carve-out.
